meanings.definition: lay out orderly or logically in a line or as if in a line
get ready for a particular purpose or event
examples: lay out the tools for the surgery
he laid out a fortune in the hope of making a huge profit

meanings.definition: bring forward and present to the mind
examples: We presented the arguments to him
We cannot represent this knowledge to our formal reason

meanings.definition: provide a detailed plan or design
examples: She laid out her plans for the new house
